message:
fix(vef): NaN determinism and null-byte hash collision in vef_claim_integration

VefMetrics::digest() now canonicalizes non-finite f64 (NaN/Inf) to 0.0
before hashing, ensuring deterministic digests per INV-VEF-SCORE-REPRODUCIBLE.

ScoreboardEntry::compute_digest() replaces null-byte delimiter with
length-prefixed encoding to prevent hash collision when proof_id values
contain embedded null bytes.

3 regression tests added.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
